name: NodeGoat A1 — server-side JavaScript injection via eval() on contribution amounts

provenance.note: Inverted the documented fix in handleContributionsUpdate: replaced parseInt(req.body.*) with eval(req.body.*) for preTax/afterTax/roth.

notes: eval() on request body = arbitrary server-side code execution. Real CWE is CWE-94/95; labelled with B-06's canonical CWE-502 (catalog home for dynamic code execution) so the loose match aligns with analyzer output.
